reviews.review_description: the worst purchase of this year.very disappointed with this ....this... thing.... it f' ing stinks.... covered in Ukraine love 💕

developer_response.body: I made it free for you!

reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this lovely VR game.  I enjoyed it very much.
It is simple,  colorful and good effects to feel joyful and happy same time.
If possible,  Allow user to import 360 photos to use as background environment inside this VR game.  Because with many different background environments to improve the game play.  Also allow more different colors of fire works if good idea.
Yes, I do recommend this game for everyone to enjoy.  Thank you.

I love fireworks and this really gives me the feeling that I just watched some when I use this app.   The reason for four stars instead of five is the annoying bubbles that fly back toward you as you shoot a firework off.  There should be a setting to turn that off.  There is a laser setting which I turn off, but it doesn't change anything in the app.  Please put in a setting to shut off the bubbles that are shooting toward your face with each new firework as then I can give you the five stars this deserves.
A nice VR game. Light entertainment :-)   However, where do I fnd the 'Exit' button - the only way I can shut this is to power down my headset?
